text.title: AI Feature GA Checklist Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the ai-feature-ga-checklist methodology end-to-end.

step.name: collect-evidence
step.action: Pull eval run, observability dashboard, cost-cap config, refusal tests, rollout doc.
step.decision-gate: If any evidence pointer is broken, BLOCK at that check.

step.name: walk-checklist-items
step.action: Per item: verdict (PASS/FAIL/WAIVED) + evidence pointer + signer.

step.name: audit-waivers
step.action: Each waiver needs a written justification + expiry date + revisit trigger.
step.decision-gate: Waiver without expiry → BLOCK; force a date even if 90 days out.

step.name: collect-sign-offs
step.action: Route to required signers (engineering lead, ml lead, trust & safety, product).

step.name: publish-and-archive
step.action: Publish GA decision; archive evidence bundle for audit.
